name: soloscrum
description: One-person AI-driven development framework. Automates the cycle from idea to GitHub Issue, task decomposition, implementation, and review. Supports github-only or linear+github tracker profiles.

tracker_profile.title: Tracker Profile
tracker_profile.description: Where SP, dependencies, and state are stored. Use 'github-only' (default) for repos restricted to GitHub Issues, or 'linear+github' for repos with Linear native sync configured.
